title: Manhunt
body:
Need FPC to work!

It's easy to use Minecraft plugin to play Manhunt (Speedrunner vs Hunters).

How to use:

Simple:

  1. /manhunt speedrunners add <player>
  2. /manhunt start
  3. Enjoy!

Advanced:

  1. Look commands and config.

Features:

  • Supports more than 1 speedrunner.
  • Supports more than 1 hunter.
  • Supports nether-tracking.
  • Supports auto-give compass.
  • Supports tab completion.
  • Supports 2 official languages:
  •  - English (en)
  •  - Russian (ru)
  • Supports custom languages.
  • Supports compass tracking delay
  • Supports auto-end and auto-spectator.
  • Supports team tracking.
  • Heal, feed and clear players on start.

Commands:

  • /manhunt speedrunners add <player>
  • /manhunt speedrunners remove <player>
  • /manhunt speedrunners list
  • /manhunt start
  • /manhunt stop

Config:

  1. Format: field: [parameters...] (default) - description.
  2. language: [en|ru] (en) - language of the plugin.
  3. compass-delay: [time] (4) - time to track player.
  4. hold-compass-to-track: [true|false] (true) - need hold compass in hand to track.
  5. team-track: [true|false] (false) - compass can track teammates.
  6. force-spectator: [true|false] (true) - force spectator on speedrunner's death.
  7. on-start:
  8.  give-compass: [true|false] (true) - give compass to players on start.
  9.  heal: [true|false] (true) - heal players on start.
  10.  feed: [true|false] (true) - feed players on start.
  11.  clear: [true|false] (true) - clear players' inventories on start.
